description: DIAGNOSTIC: Verify APF traffic path and ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR root cause. #353 reported all h2_hold=1 services broken, but NO etap.log entries found at test time (15:36). Need to confirm test PC traffic goes through Etap bridge.

services.test_prompt: DIAGNOSTIC: Open page, wait 10 seconds, then screenshot. Check DevTools Network tab for ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Also check if any requests show MITM certificate (issuer should be Etap CA, not original CA).
services.expected: Page should load normally (no keyword = no block). If ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR occurs, check certificate chain.

services.test_prompt: DIAGNOSTIC: Open page (known working Tier 1 service with h2_hold=0). Compare behavior with consensus.app. Both should load page normally.
services.expected: Page loads normally. This is the CONTROL test.

notes: KEY DIAGNOSTIC QUESTIONS: (1) Does test PC traffic go through Etap MITM? Check cert issuer in browser. (2) Is ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR from APF or from network/cert issues? (3) Compare h2_hold=0 (claude) vs h2_hold=1 (consensus) behavior. If both work = APF not the cause. If only consensus fails = h2_hold issue confirmed.
